channel.title: 注册码 on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in 注册码 on William Fang

item.title: Sublime 3207注册码
item.description: Sublime 3207 目前是2019年最新版本 SUBLIME TEXT 3 BUILD 3207 AND 3208 LICENCE KEY 执行步骤： 断开网络连接 修改 /etc/hosts Windows | "C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts" Mac | "/Private/etc/hosts" Linux | "/etc/hosts" 增加以下代码 127.0.0.1 www.sublimetext.com 127.0.0.1 sublimetext.com 127.0.0.1 sublimehq.com 127.0.0.1 license.sublimehq.com 127.0.0.1 45.55.255.55 127.0.0.1 45.55.41.223 0.0.0.0 license.sublimehq.com 0.0.0.0 45.55.255.55 0.0.0.0 45.55.41.223
